title: Premium Double Exposure Tourism Poster AI
sourceTitle: Premium Double Exposure Tourism Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium double-exposure travel tourism poster for Portugal, featuring Cristiano Ronaldo and a landmark montage of Belem Tower, seaside cliffs, Portuguese old-town architecture, golden ocean reflections, and 25 de Abril Bridge. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo stands confidently as the adult cinematic portrait subject, wearing sleek black bomber jacket, backpack, and smartphone in one hand, with an upward inspirational gaze and the destination story contained inside the silhouette. Scene: Warm beige minimalist campaign background with birds in a golden-hour sky, subtle national accents, and a breathtaking destination landscape montage blended inside the hero silhouette. Composition: Fixed sophisticated double-exposure poster layout: hero portrait on the left or center-left, destination montage inside the body silhouette, clean beige negative space, right-side large destination typography, and premium tourism campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Sophisticated double exposure, destination landmarks inside the silhouette, smartphone travel prop, birds crossing the sunset sky, beige luxury campaign background, right-side destination title, and high-end magazine tourism finish. Style: Ultra-premium tourism advertising poster with cinematic portrait realism, seamless double-exposure blending, high-end magazine cover aesthetic, soft golden lighting, realistic skin texture, clean luxury layout, and inspirational travel campaign polish. Color Palette: Warm beige minimalist base, golden-hour ocean light, destination flag accents tied to Portugal, deep black wardrobe contrast, soft sky gradients, and refined luxury travel neutrals. Lighting: Soft golden-hour light on face and jacket, warm reflections inside the landscape montage, subtle rim glow around the silhouette, and gentle atmospheric depth without harsh contrast. Camera: Cinematic portrait camera with confident upright stance, upward gaze, realistic facial detail, clean lens compression, and enough negative space for readable tourism typography. Typography: PORTUGAL appears in large elegant modern letters on the right side, while Move. Explore. Feel. and Time to Discover. appear as smaller premium tourism campaign slogans integrated below or around the title. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Premium Double Exposure Tourism Poster Portugal

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium double-exposure travel tourism poster for Morocco, featuring fictional adult Moroccan surfer with wind-tousled hair and a landmark montage of Marrakesh arches, Atlas mountain ridges, Atlantic waves, desert roads, and blue coastal streets. Subject: fictional adult Moroccan surfer with wind-tousled hair stands confidently as the adult cinematic portrait subject, wearing sand-colored bomber jacket, canvas backpack, and phone with map open, with an upward inspirational gaze and the destination story contained inside the silhouette. Scene: Warm beige minimalist campaign background with birds in a golden-hour sky, subtle national accents, and a breathtaking destination landscape montage blended inside the hero silhouette. Composition: Fixed sophisticated double-exposure poster layout: hero portrait on the left or center-left, destination montage inside the body silhouette, clean beige negative space, right-side large destination typography, and premium tourism campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Sophisticated double exposure, destination landmarks inside the silhouette, smartphone travel prop, birds crossing the sunset sky, beige luxury campaign background, right-side destination title, and high-end magazine tourism finish. Style: Ultra-premium tourism advertising poster with cinematic portrait realism, seamless double-exposure blending, high-end magazine cover aesthetic, soft golden lighting, realistic skin texture, clean luxury layout, and inspirational travel campaign polish. Color Palette: Warm beige minimalist base, golden-hour ocean light, destination flag accents tied to Morocco, deep black wardrobe contrast, soft sky gradients, and refined luxury travel neutrals. Lighting: Soft golden-hour light on face and jacket, warm reflections inside the landscape montage, subtle rim glow around the silhouette, and gentle atmospheric depth without harsh contrast. Camera: Cinematic portrait camera with confident upright stance, upward gaze, realistic facial detail, clean lens compression, and enough negative space for readable tourism typography. Typography: MOROCCO appears in large elegant modern letters on the right side, while Cross. Drift. Feel. and Time to Wander. appear as smaller premium tourism campaign slogans integrated below or around the title. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
